repo_prior_art.cite: none; closest eid_lingam_direction_min_order_v1 concerns non-Gaussian cumulant fibers, not score-Jacobian ANM geometry

published_prior_art.cite: rolland2022score — population diagonal score-Jacobian leaf criterion
chernoff1952measure — simple product-measure testing exponent; the C_m calibration is the proposed addition
chernoff1952measure — local simple-testing machinery, without the mirror ANM parameterization
zhu2023sample — finite-sample SCORE topological-order guarantee under a curvature margin

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no other catalogue entry studies unknown-mechanism score-Jacobian adaptation

published_prior_art.cite: koehler2023efficiency concerns score-versus-likelihood density-estimation efficiency, not causal-order adaptation; Zhu and Rolland give no such lower bound
no verified SCORE/ANM paper establishes tilted-loss Chernoff efficiency for a concrete common learner near the reversible center

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 4 gap and related_work
novelty_flags.one_line: The claim that Zhu et al. “assume score-estimation control” is inaccurate: zhu2023sample derives DNN score-matching and topological-order error bounds under its structural curvature assumption; distinguish its derived DNN bound from the proposed Hermite-sieve/local-frontier claim.

soundness_flags.label: def:mechanism-class and Theorems 1, 4, 5
soundness_flags.one_line: No compatibility/non-emptiness condition relates L, B, and kappa, although the envelope and Sobolev radius upper-bound E[g''(Z)^2]; for admissible declared constants G_s(L,B,kappa) can be empty, making the universal results vacuous and the lower-bound existential impossible.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 4
soundness_flags.one_line: The displayed deviation centers the full two-fold contrast at E[widehat Delta_n^H|G_{n,k}] with a free k, but gives no orientation-selection or conditional-bias bound linking that conditional mean to the signed C_m(delta_n) signal; the stated concentration therefore does not by itself imply the final error conclusion.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 5
soundness_flags.one_line: “Any score-Jacobian learner or score-contrast detector whose decision is measurable with respect to its outputs” is not a defined statistical class and permits arbitrary data encoding through those outputs; state a restricted plug-in/stability/output model before asserting a universal lower bound.

soundness_flags.label: ass:weighted-envelope
soundness_flags.one_line: The exponentially decaying global derivative envelope is an instrumental strengthening used for the uniform rate, while its justification gives only manufactured examples rather than a realistic mechanism regime; either derive a rate under a standard Gaussian-Sobolev/tail condition or make this a defended substantive application class.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Theorems 1–3
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The C_m-to-Chernoff expansion, equalizer, and elbow are accepted only pointwise along each fixed admissible mirror path.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Pointwise oracle likelihood benchmark conditional on fixed g in a nonempty G_s(L,B,kappa), not a uniform nonlinear-ANM constant.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Theorems 4–5 and Open-ended Question 1
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Uniform claims are accepted only for the displayed mechanism class, specified orientation-blind detector class, and likelihood-supercritical sequences.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Conditional adaptation frontier after the detector class and class feasibility are made precise; no Chernoff exponent is claimed for the sieve detector.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add explicit feasible-parameter inequalities and one displayed centered Hermite witness g_0 proving G_s(L,B,kappa) is nonempty; calibrate the Hermite-shell alternatives against the same constants.
Replace the unrestricted A_n quantifier with a formally defined plug-in score-Jacobian class, including allowed training sigma-fields, output regularity, and a non-encoding/stability restriction.
Add the missing conditional-mean/orientation-selection remainder to Theorem 4 and prove it is o(delta_n^2) under the stated sieve rate before deriving the sign-consistency boundary.

State Zhu et al.'s actual DNN/curvature theorem with a section or theorem anchor, then sharpen the contribution to a strict local comparison—e.g. an attainable exponent or a proved lower-bound separation for the specified detector class.

recommended_next_step: Revise the lower-bound decision class, establish nonempty feasible mechanism parameters, and repair the upper-bound bias bridge; then reassess the field-tier adaptation separation against Zhu et al.'s verified finite-sample SCORE result.
